getallheaders ============= PHP `getallheaders()` polyfill. Compatible with PHP >= 5.3. [![Build Status](https://travis-ci.org/ralouphie/getallheaders.svg?branch=master)](https://travis-ci.org/ralouphie/getallheaders) [![Coverage Status](https://coveralls.io/repos/ralouphie/getallheaders/badge.png?branch=master)](https://coveralls.io/r/ralouphie/getallheaders?branch=master) [![Latest Stable Version](https://poser.pugx.org/ralouphie/getallheaders/v/stable.png)](https://packagist.org/packages/ralouphie/getallheaders) [![Latest Unstable Version](https://poser.pugx.org/ralouphie/getallheaders/v/unstable.png)](https://packagist.org/packages/ralouphie/getallheaders) [![License](https://poser.pugx.org/ralouphie/getallheaders/license.png)](https://packagist.org/packages/ralouphie/getallheaders) This is a simple polyfill for [`getallheaders()`](http://www.php.net/manual/en/function.getallheaders.php). ## Install For PHP version **`>= 5.6`**: ``` composer require ralouphie/getallheaders ``` For PHP version **`< 5.6`**: ``` composer require ralouphie/getallheaders "^2" ```
